name: AgentIAM by Achilles
description: Pre-execution safety layer for autonomous agent actions on Base. Six x402 services, USDC-settled, signed verification proofs. No account, no API key, no private-key handling.

facilitator.note: Appears as payTo in 402 quotes. Escrows + sweeps to provider_wallet. Expected routing.

services.name: flowcore
services.summary: Full pipeline — NoLeak + RiskOracle + SecureExec + MemGuard in one call. Returns decision + risk_score + per-check proofs.

services.name: noleak
services.summary: Execution integrity / leak detection — scans payload for tampering, prompt injection, unauthorised data flow.

services.name: memguard
services.summary: Memory state verification — detects drift, corruption, unauthorised modification vs. reference.

services.name: riskoracle
services.summary: Pre-action multi-factor risk scoring — market, counterparty, operational.

services.name: secureexec
services.summary: Sandboxed tool-call validation — confirms tool call is safe to run in an isolated environment.

services.name: validate
services.summary: Full EP policy validation — identity + integrity + risk + compliance flags + proof_hash.
